home.name: Raffael Castro Rodrigues
home.headline: I build reliable software across the full life-cycle — from architecture to pixel-perfect interfaces.

about.title: About Me
about.lead: Software engineer who owns the whole software life-cycle — idealization, architecture, development, debugging and optimization.
about.paragraph1: I'm Raffael, a Brazilian software engineer based in Portugal. I enjoy turning ideas into reliable products and acting as the bridge between technical and business teams. Currently I'm a Software Engineer at Kito Health and IT Manager & Programmer at HumanizeIT.
about.paragraph2: I hold a Bachelor's in Internet Systems and I'm pursuing a Master's in Multimedia at the University of Porto (FEUP). A lifelong gamer at heart, I bring that same curiosity and playfulness into crafting great software — and one day, games.

skills.title: Skills
skills.lead: The stack I use to design, build and ship.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: Things I've designed, built and shipped.

items.name: 7 Seconds
items.desc: Responsive multimedia website I built individually within a group project for the Multimedia Lab at the University of Porto.

items.name: Through My Eyes
items.desc: Another responsive multimedia site crafted solo within a group project for the Master in Multimedia at the University of Porto.

items.name: Evasion Predict
items.desc: Machine-learning application that predicts student dropout before it happens, targeting 80%+ accuracy. My final undergraduate thesis project.

items.name: Web Chat Bot
items.desc: Chatbot integration built on IBM Watson, connecting multiple student project groups through a shared conversational API.

work.title: Experience
work.lead: Where I've worked and what I built there.

items.desc: Own the full software life-cycle: ideation, architecture, development, debugging and optimization. Act as the bridge between technical and business departments, turning cross-team needs into working solutions.
Set the engineering standards for the startup (Git, AWS, agile tooling) and built its first responsive product in React. Later delivered a custom e-commerce platform with PHP, Laravel and MySQL.

Built features, fixed bugs and wrote unit tests for a major regional bank's software across front-end and back-end, working directly with the project's APIs in biweekly Scrum/Kanban sprints. (C#, ASP.NET, MVC)
Produced and edited studio video content and built the company's blog and website, adopting new media technologies. (WordPress, Adobe Premiere)

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.lead: Open to opportunities and collaborations. Let's talk.
